SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY YOLANDA ARENAS--SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY COUNTY SF TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARGUELLO, IVANIA $745.41 PRINCIPAL, $60.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $805.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $350.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT ARGUELLO, IVANIA
